turns.user: Trên twitter đang có gì hot trend
turns.assistant_text:
Here are some of the current trending topics on Twitter:

1. **This 23yo creator** - A creator has generated over 53 million views using a mix of AI and YouTube Shorts automation. She identifies trending videos on platforms like TikTok and Instagram, then uses AI tools to create content quickly. Last month, her system earned her over $15,000 in revenue. [Read more](https://x.com/0xbeinginvested/status/2061471110261072277)

2. **How would you react??** - A comedic post asking for reactions, which has gained some traction. [View tweet](https://x.com/wildkateee/status/2061258199513067783)

3. **To all cockroaches trending** - A tweet discussing political issues in India, questioning the qualifications of a public figure. [View tweet](https://x.com/Questio05585171/status/2061483721526800829)

4. **Profiles that are admired** - A post about social media profiles that are admired rather than just followed, featuring hashtags related to beauty and modeling. [View tweet](https://x.com/AuSaCs1/status/2061605306375778806)

5. **Capitec and Standard Bank** - A humorous take on the trending status of Standard Bank for the wrong reasons, contrasting it with Capitec. [View tweet](https://x.com/ChrisExcel102/status/2030936300648378577)

These topics reflect a mix of humor, social commentary, and insights into content creation trends.

items.title: -> This 23yo creator
items.summary:
-> This 23yo creator 
-> generated over 53M
-> views using a mix
-> of ai + youtube 
-> shorts automation
-> all she does is run
-> a tight loop, she spots 
-> trending videos on 
-> tiktok, twitter, and 
-> instagram reels before
-> they hit youtube
-> then she feeds those 
-> concepts into ai 
-> content tools to 
-> generate scripts, ai 
-> voiceovers, captions, 
-> and thumbnails in
-> minutes instead of hours
-> finally she batches 
-> everything and schedules 
-> it to post on youtube 
-> throughout the week
-> no camera, no filming 
-> herself, no editing all day
-> the ai handles production 
-> while she focuses 
-> on finding patterns
-> last month that system 
-> made her $15,653.43
-> youtube shorts ad 
-> revenue + affiliate 
-> links in descriptions
-> that’s about $522
-> per day from content that 
-> was mostly automated
-> 53M views didn’t come 
-> from one lucky viral hit
-> it came from posting
-> 200–300 shorts and 
-> letting the algorithm
-> test what sticks
-> most videos get 1k–10k 
-> views a few hit 1M+ and 
-> carry the channel
-> every single college 
-> student with a laptop
-> and 1–2 hours a day
-> could run a version of
-> this, low cost, no degree 
-> needed, and you learn 
-> distribution + pattern 
-> recognition skills that pay 
-> way beyond youtube
-> the real edge now isn’t 
-> using ai everyone has that
-> the edge is moving fast 
-> while competition is still 
-> low, testing 10 ideas a 
-> day, and letting
-> the views compound.
